productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men ZX Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of the vintage and the modern, sporty looks and style, the ZX Casual from adidas originals lives up to its name. UpperLeather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes in synthetic leather on the midfootSuede overlays as the toe cap and heel capRound toe for an easy FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole with  ZX moulded heel detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with hexagonal lugs for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustClean the suede patches with a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
